juri-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state knockdown on Punish Counter, or when it hits as a mid-air Counter or Punish Counter
Juggle state time is extended when attack hits a mid-air opponent as a Punish Counter
juri-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Becomes fully cancelable during FSE, even when not chained into; not airborne despite the animation; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 2f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 5th recovery frame; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

juri-chain-stand-heavy-kick.name_ja: [チェーンコンボ] 立ち強K

kyosesho.name: Kyosesho
notes: A forward-moving attack that can be canceled into special moves
kyosesho.notes_sc: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 2f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents

chain-kyosesho.name: [Chain combo] Kyosesho
chain-kyosesho.name_ja: [チェーンコンボ] 狂背掌
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

senkai-kick.name: Senkai Kick
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching
2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
senkai-kick.notes_sc: Chained Feng Shui Engine version; not airborne despite the animation; the special/chain cancel window only applies when chaining into 6MK and the KD doesn't allow anything to juggle on hit; 2 extra recovery frames on whiff; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

chain-senkai-kick.name: [Chain combo] Senkai Kick
chain-senkai-kick.name_ja: [チェーンコンボ] 殲廻脚
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching
2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
Produces a slam knockdown

renko-kicks.name: Renko Kicks
notes: A two-hit sequence of kicks that can be canceled into special moves
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
renko-kicks.notes_sc: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 3f extra recovery on whiff; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 4f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; canceling the 1st hit uses less juggle potential, allowing alternate juggle routes in exchange for some initial damage; extended whiff hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery

chain-renko-kicks.name: [Chain combo] Renko Kicks
chain-renko-kicks.name_ja: [チェーンコンボ] 連剋脚
notes: A two-hit sequence of kicks that can be canceled into special moves

korenzan.name: Korenzan
notes: A multi-hit kick that can be canceled into special moves
Second attack produces a ground bound when hitting a mid-air opponent
korenzan.notes_sc: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); both hits knock down; 2nd hit causes OTG bounce vs. airborne opponents; 8f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into

chain-korenzan.name: [Chain combo] Korenzan
chain-korenzan.name_ja: [チェーンコンボ] 鉤鎌斬
notes: Second attack produces a ground bound when hitting a mid-air opponent

death-crest-2.name: Death Crest (2)
notes: A combination attack that sends an opponent flying

death-crest-3.name: Death Crest (3)
notes: A combination attack that sends an opponent flying
*Can only be canceled into a Super Art on hit

fuhajin-light.name: Fuhajin (Light)
notes: Perform an upwards kick while capturing ki from your immediate surroundings. Increases your Fuha stock by 1 upon completion
Has a clash hitbox from frames 8 - 13
Adds 1 Fuha stock on frame 10
2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

fuhajin-medium.name: Fuhajin (Medium)
notes: Perform an upwards kick while capturing ki from your immediate surroundings. Increases your Fuha stock by 1 upon completion
Has a clash hitbox from frames 11 - 16
Adds 1 Fuha stock on frame 13

fuhajin-heavy.name: Fuhajin (Heavy)
notes: Perform an upwards kick while capturing ki from your immediate surroundings. Increases your Fuha stock by 1 upon completion
Has a clash hitbox from frames 23 - 28
Adds 1 Fuha stock on frame 25

fuhajin-od.name: Fuhajin (OD)
notes: Perform an upwards kick while capturing ki from your immediate surroundings. Increases your Fuha stock by 1 upon completion
Has a clash hitbox from frames 12 - 17
Adds 1 Fuha stock on frame 16

saihasho.name: Saihasho
notes: A roundhouse kick that fires a projectile low to the ground. Useful for checking your opponents, in combos, or as a way to start offensive pressure
Can be followed up with an Ankensatsu or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked
saihasho.notes_sc: 2-hit OD projectile; only the 2nd hit knocks down; can press MK or HK to cancel into other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock and 1 Drive bar; SA2 cancel: KD+57/+17

boosted-saihasho.name: [Boosted] Saihasho
notes: A roundhouse kick that fires a projectile low to the ground. Useful for checking your opponents, in combos, or as a way to start offensive pressure
Can transition to boosted Ankenstatsu or boosted Go Ohsatsu when Fuha is stocked
Cannot use the same attack twice
boosted-saihasho.notes_sc: 2-hit OD projectile; only the 2nd hit knocks down; can press MK or HK to cancel into other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock and 1 Drive bar; SA2 cancel: KD+57/+17

saihasho-od.name: Saihasho (OD)
notes: A roundhouse kick that fires a projectile low to the ground. Useful for checking your opponents, in combos, or as a way to start offensive pressure
Can transition to Overdrive Ankensatsu or Overdrive Go Ohsatsu when Fuha is stocked
Cannot use the same attack twice

ankensatsu.name: Ankensatsu
notes: Leap forward in a low arc and come down with an axe kick. Useful as a way to approach while avoiding attacks targeted at your feet, and can also be used in combos
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 8 - 27
Produces a slam knockdown on a mid-air hit

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 8 - 27

ankensatsu.notes_sc: Costs 1 Fuha stock; 8-27f low crush; puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle OTG bounce state (useful for SA3 cancel); can press LK or HK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely)

boosted-ankensatsu.name: [Boosted] Ankensatsu
notes: Leap forward in a low arc and come down with an axe kick. Useful as a way to approach while avoiding attacks targeted at your feet, and can also be used in combos
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 27
Can transition to boosted Saihasho or boosted Go Ohsatsu when Fuha is stocked
Cannot use the same attack twice
Produces a floor bound during a mid-air hit
boosted-ankensatsu.notes_sc: Costs 1 Fuha stock; 8-27f low crush; puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle OTG bounce state (useful for SA3 cancel); can press LK or HK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely)

ankensatsu-od.name: Ankensatsu (OD)
notes: Leap forward in a low arc and come down with an axe kick. Useful as a way to approach while avoiding attacks targeted at your feet, and can also be used in combos
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 27
Can transition to Overdrive Saihasho or Overdrive Go Ohsatsu when Fuha is stocked
Cannot use the same attack twice
Produces a floor bound during a mid-air hit

go-ohsatsu.name: Go Ohsatsu
notes: Lunge forward and let fly a swift overhead roundhouse. Its long reach makes it effective when used for surprise attacks from a distance, and it can also be canceled into from normal moves to make combos
go-ohsatsu.notes_sc: All 3 hits are Super cancelable; first hit keeps opponent grounded, 2nd and 3rd hits put opponent into limited juggle state; can press LK or MK to cancel any hit into other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock and 1 Drive bar; SA2 cancel: +17/+17 (1st hit), KD+54/+15 (2nd hit), KD+52/+4 (3rd hit); 3rd hit cannot juggle into held SA2 dash attack

go-ohsatsu-fuha-stock.name: [Boosted] Go Ohsatsu
notes: Lunge forward and let fly a swift overhead roundhouse. Its long reach makes it effective when used for surprise attacks from a distance, and it can also be canceled into from normal moves to make combos
Can transition to boosted Saihasho or boosted Ankensatsu when Fuha is stocked
Cannot use the same attack twice
go-ohsatsu-fuha-stock.notes_sc: All 3 hits are Super cancelable; first hit keeps opponent grounded, 2nd and 3rd hits put opponent into limited juggle state; can press LK or MK to cancel any hit into other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock and 1 Drive bar; SA2 cancel: +17/+17 (1st hit), KD+54/+15 (2nd hit), KD+52/+4 (3rd hit); 3rd hit cannot juggle into held SA2 dash attack

go-ohsatsu-od.name: Go Ohsatsu (OD)
notes: Lunge forward and let fly a swift overhead roundhouse. Its long reach makes it effective when used for surprise attacks from a distance, and it can also be canceled into from normal moves to make combos
Can transition to Overdrive Saihasho or Overdrive Ankensatsu when Fuha is stocked
Cannot use the same attack twice

tensenrin-light.name: Tensenrin (Light)
notes: Rotate like a windmill while unleashing a series of kicks. Can be used in a variety of situations to deal big damage

tensenrin-medium.name: Tensenrin (Medium)
notes: Rotate like a windmill while unleashing a series of kicks. Can be used in a variety of situations to deal big damage
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 48

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8

tensenrin-heavy.name: Tensenrin (Heavy)
notes: Rotate like a windmill while unleashing a series of kicks. Can be used in a variety of situations to deal big damage
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 48

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8

tensenrin-od.name: Tensenrin (OD)
notes: Rotate like a windmill while unleashing a series of kicks. Can be used in a variety of situations to deal big damage
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9
Only transitions to the final attack if the attack hits

shiku-sen.name: Shiku-sen
notes: A surprise attack performed by kicking while airborne. Useful for surprise attacks or as a way to approach your opponent
shiku-sen.notes_sc: During forward jump only; can input follow-up on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state (lower connect allows better follow-up juggles); button strength does not affect trajectory

shiku-sen-od.name: Shiku-sen (OD)
notes: A surprise attack performed by kicking while airborne. Useful for surprise attacks or as a way to approach your opponent

shiren-sen.name: Shiren-sen
notes: After shiku-sen
A series of kicks performed from Shiku-sen that tack on additional damage and knock the opponent down
shiren-sen.notes_sc: Comes out on hit only; can delay the input to get better KD Advantage; no follow-up after juggle state; Juri is in a crouching state during landing recovery; total recovery time before landing varies by juggle height

shiren-sen-od.name: Shiren-sen (OD)
notes: A series of kicks performed from Shiku-sen that tack on additional damage and knock the opponent down

sakkai-fuhazan.name: Sakkai Fuhazan
notes: Fire multiple ki blasts with a kick and follow it up with another giant ki blast to knock an opponent away. Easy to work into aerial combos against opponents who have been launched into the air
Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 8
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Hold down the button to increase damage by 300

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 8

sakkai-fuhazan.notes_sc: Projectile hitbox; active frames and KD Adv. are highly variable based on screen position; Full Dmg distribution: 200x4,300,700

feng-shui-engine.name: Feng Shui Engine
notes: Power up your abilities by unleashing the power of the Feng Shui Engine embedded in your eye. Once powered up, you will be able to cancel normal moves into other normal moves or even unique attacks
Allows you to perform chain combos on the ground or in the air while the technique is active
Can use the same strength attack button or a stronger attack button, but cannot chain down to weaker attacks
All normal attacks and some unique attacks can now cancel into special moves
Hold down the button during startup to rush forward
feng-shui-engine.notes_sc: Lasts 600 frames (10 seconds); timer stops counting down during attack hit/block freeze; allows Juri to chain into normals of equal or ascending strength (cannot chain back into the same attack); chains change the properties of certain moves (6MK and Heavy normals become knockdowns); 5HK/2LK/2HK/6MK become cancelable

feng-shui-engine-rush.name: Feng Shui Engine (Rush)
notes: During Feng Shui Engine's activation start-up
Power up your abilities by unleashing the power of the Feng Shui Engine embedded in your eye. Once powered up, you will be able to cancel normal moves into other normal moves or even unique attacks
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Hold down the button to rush forward
Forces a juggle state knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
Can cancel into normal moves, unique attacks, special moves, super arts, and Drive Impacts

kaisen-dankai-raku.name: Kaisen Dankai Raku
notes: Unleash the full power of the Feng Shui Engine to perform a powerful sequence of attacks. Useful when trying to tack on big damage during combos or when turning the tables on your opponent
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves
kaisen-dankai-raku.notes_sc: Cinematic time regenerates ~2 Drive bars for Juri

kaisen-dankai-raku-ca.name: Kaisen Dankai Raku (Critical Art)
notes: When under 25% vitality
Unleash the full power of the Feng Shui Engine to perform a powerful sequence of attacks. Useful when trying to tack on big damage during combos or when turning the tables on your opponent
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves

spider-fang-throw.name: Spider Fang Throw
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent's head with your foot to make them hunch over, and send them flying with two kicks. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
spider-fang-throw.notes_sc: Has access to corner throw loops by dashing (+3); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

shadow-kick-throw.name: Shadow Kick Throw
notes: When near opponent
Use one foot to knock your opponent down, and follow up by stepping on their back. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
shadow-kick-throw.notes_sc: No throw oki after back throwing opponent into corner, but can use meaty strikes; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

zanka-sen.name: Zanka-sen
notes: During a jump
When near opponent
Latch onto an airborne opponent's back and kick them to the ground behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
zanka-sen.notes_sc: KD Adv. varies based on height (lower height = worse advantage); switches sides; no oki after throwing opponent back into the corner
